Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************

 The Yoneda embedding for enriched categories

 In this file, we define the Yoneda embedding for enriched categories.
 To do so, we first define representable presheaves and representable
 natural transformations.

 There are a couple of things to notice about this construction, First
 of all, to guarantee that the presheaf category is enriched, we need
 to assume that the monoidal category over which we enrich, is symmetric
 and closed, and that we have enough limits, namely equalizers and
 products indexed over the objects of `C` (for this, we must assume
 that `C` is sufficiently small compared to `V`). Second of all, since
 the presheaves land in the monoidal category `V`, most of the
 construction is manipulating the function spaces of `V`.

 Contents
 1. Representable presheaves
 2. Representable natural transformations
 3. The enriched Yoneda embedding

 **********************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.OppositeEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.SelfEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Section YonedaEmbedding.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C : category}
          (E : enrichment C V)
          (EqV : Equalizers V)
          (PV : Products C V)
          (PV' : Products (C × C) V).

  (**
   1. Representable presheaves
   *)
  Section RepresentablePresheaf.
    Context (y : C).

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
functor_data (C ^opp) V

C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
functor_data (C ^opp) V

C ^opp → V

C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ a b : C ^opp, C ^opp ⟦ a, b ⟧ → V ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
C ^opp → V
 exact (λ x, E ⦃ x , y ⦄).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ a b : C ^opp,
C ^opp ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ V ⟦ (λ x : C ^opp, E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a,
  (λ x : C ^opp, E ⦃ x, y ⦄) b ⟧
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ f, precomp_arr E y f).
    Defined.

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
precomp_arr E y (identity x) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
functor_compax enriched_repr_presheaf_data
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
f₁: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C ^opp ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
precomp_arr E y (f₂ · f₁) =
precomp_arr E y f₁ · precomp_arr E y f₂

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
f₁: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C ^opp ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
precomp_arr E y f₁ · precomp_arr E y f₂ =
precomp_arr E y f₁ · precomp_arr E y f₂

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
functor_data (C ^opp) V
 exact enriched_repr_presheaf_data.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
is_functor enriched_repr_presheaf_data
 exact is_functor_enriched_repr_presheaf.
    Defined.

    Definition enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data
      : functor_enrichment_data
          enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
          (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V)
      := λ x₁ x₂, internal_lam (sym_mon_braiding _ _ _ · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y).

    Arguments enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data /.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
is_functor_enrichment
  enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
is_functor_enrichment
  enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ x : C ^opp,
enriched_id (op_enrichment V E) x
· enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x x =
enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ x y z : C ^opp,
enriched_comp (op_enrichment V E) x y z
· enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x z =
enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data y z
#⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x y
· enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ (x y : C ^opp) (f : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
  (# enriched_repr_presheaf_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr (op_enrichment V E) f
· enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ x : C ^opp,
enriched_id (op_enrichment V E) x
· enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x x =
enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
enriched_id E x
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x x y) =
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_id E x
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_id E x
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x x y) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x x y)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) =
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y) =
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h = ?y'

          apply tensor_split.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_id (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x x y) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x, x ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x x y =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a · h #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x)
· enriched_comp E x x y =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
      · enriched_comp E x x y)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ identity I_{ V} · mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a · h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) = mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

        apply sym_mon_braiding_runitor.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ x y z : C ^opp,
enriched_comp (op_enrichment V E) x y z
· enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x z =
enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data y z
#⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x y
· enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
#⊗ internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
· internal_comp (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧),
(sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
 · internal_comp (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
 · internal_comp (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_comp (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_comp (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
     ((E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
     #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
    ((E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
  #⊗ (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
      #⊗ h)
· identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
   #⊗ (internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
   #⊗ (internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y))

y: C

mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
   #⊗ (internal_lam

            (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
       #⊗ h)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y))

· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)

   #⊗ (internal_lam

            (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
#⊗ (internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y) #⊗ h)
· identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
?b = ?t2

PV': Products (C × C) V

x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp

internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
#⊗ (internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y) #⊗ h)
· identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) = ?b

PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp

internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
#⊗ (internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y) #⊗ h)
· identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) = ?y'

PV': Products (C × C) V

x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp

(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
 · identity ((E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)))
#⊗ (internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)) = 
?y'

    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

PV': Products (C × C) V

· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y) = ?t20

            apply idpath.

       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y))
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y) = ?t2

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y))

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)) = ?b

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y =
?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y
     #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y))) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
   · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ y)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
   · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
              #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁
            · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₁ y

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
   · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
              #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
     ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
   · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
              #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E x₃ x₂ x₁

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ identity a
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity a
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ a)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity a
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
           (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
           (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
           (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) = ?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) = ?b

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
           (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· (identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
   · sym_mon_braiding V
       ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity a
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a
           (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
               · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)))))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))) =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))) = 
?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· ((identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) a (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (h #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ (h #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
      · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
          (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))) =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

          (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))) = ?b

· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (h #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (h #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
    · h #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2
