PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
   · identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
       (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
     (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
            · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
                (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))))) =
identity ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
             (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
             (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
         · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
             (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)))) = ?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
      · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · identity
       ((E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
        ⊗ ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)))) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
     (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V
       ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity
  ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        apply id_left.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ (x y : C ^opp) (f : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
  (# enriched_repr_presheaf_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr (op_enrichment V E) f
· enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data x y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧),
internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) =
(enriched_from_arr E f
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) =
(enriched_from_arr E f
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_from_arr (precomp_arr E y f)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · precomp_arr E y f)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) · precomp_arr E y f) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f =
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f =
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V}) =
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· (mon_runitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
   · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)) =
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄) =
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

        apply sym_mon_braiding_runitor.
    Qed.

    Definition enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment
      : functor_enrichment
          enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
          (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V)
      := enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data
         ,,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_laws.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
FunctorCategory.functor_category (C ^opp) V
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
(λ x : FunctorCategory.functor_category (C ^opp) V,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (functor_enrichment_disp_cat
            (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V))))
   x) ?pr1

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
FunctorCategory.functor_category (C ^opp) V
 exact enriched_repr_presheaf_functor.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
(λ x : FunctorCategory.functor_category (C ^opp) V,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (functor_enrichment_disp_cat
            (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V))))
   x) enriched_repr_presheaf_functor
 exact enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment.
    Defined.
  End RepresentablePresheaf.

  Arguments enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data /.

  (**
   2. Representable natural transformations
   *)
  Section RepresentableTransformation.
    Context {y₁ y₂ : C}
            (g : y₁ --> y₂).

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
⟹ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
⟹ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
nat_trans_data (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
is_nat_trans (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂) ?t

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
nat_trans_data (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂)
 exact (λ x, postcomp_arr E x g).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
is_nat_trans (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂)
  (λ x : C ^opp, postcomp_arr E x g)
 abstract
          (intros x₁ x₂ f ; cbn ;
           rewrite precomp_postcomp_arr ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
nat_trans_enrichment enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
nat_trans_enrichment enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
∏ x y : C ^opp,
enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂ x y
· precomp_arr (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ y)
    (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor x) =
enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁ x y
· postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x)
    (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)
· precomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)
    (postcomp_arr E x₁ g) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁)
· postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (postcomp_arr E x₂ g)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧),
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)
 · precomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)
     (postcomp_arr E x₁ g)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁)
 · postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
     (postcomp_arr E x₂ g)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)
 · precomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)
     (postcomp_arr E x₁ g)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁)
 · postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
     (postcomp_arr E x₂ g)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· precomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)
    (postcomp_arr E x₁ g) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (postcomp_arr E x₂ g) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (precomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)
     (postcomp_arr E x₁ g) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
     (postcomp_arr E x₂ g) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (identity ((E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ postcomp_arr E x₁ g
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)) =
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁) #⊗ h
· (postcomp_arr (self_enrichment V) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
     (postcomp_arr E x₂ g) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))

  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (identity ((E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ postcomp_arr E x₁ g
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)) =

PV': Products (C × C) V

x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· identity ((E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)
 · identity ((E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)))
#⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) = ?b

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)
#⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)

identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁) · postcomp_arr E x₂ g =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₁ · postcomp_arr E x₂ g)) =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · (postcomp_arr E x₁ g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)) =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
· postcomp_arr E x₁ g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂ =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x₂ x₁ y₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
· postcomp_arr E x₁ g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
   · postcomp_arr E x₁ g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)) =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E x₁ g
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)) =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E x₁ g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ (h · postcomp_arr E x₁ g)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E x₁ g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
· identity (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E x₁ g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ x₁, y₂ ⦄)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Definition enriched_repr_nat_trans
      : enriched_repr_presheaf y₁ --> enriched_repr_presheaf y₂
      := enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor ,, enriched_repr_nat_trans_enrichment.
  End RepresentableTransformation.

  (**
   3. The enriched Yoneda embedding
   *)
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_data C
  (enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_data C
  (enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
C
→ enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
C
→ enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
 exact (λ y, enriched_repr_presheaf y).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
  ⟦ (λ y : C, enriched_repr_presheaf y) a,
  (λ y : C, enriched_repr_presheaf y) b ⟧
 exact (λ y₁ y₂ g, enriched_repr_nat_trans g).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
is_functor enriched_yoneda_data

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
is_functor enriched_yoneda_data

PV: Products C V

functor_idax enriched_yoneda_data
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_compax enriched_yoneda_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_idax enriched_yoneda_data
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
# enriched_yoneda_data (identity y) =
identity (enriched_yoneda_data y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
isPredicate
  (Core.mor_disp (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_data y))
     (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_data y)))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
pr1 (# enriched_yoneda_data (identity y)) =
pr1 (identity (enriched_yoneda_data y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
isPredicate
  (Core.mor_disp (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_data y))
     (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_data y)))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: FunctorCategory.functor_category (C ^opp) V
⟦ pr1 (enriched_yoneda_data y),
pr1 (enriched_yoneda_data y) ⟧
isaprop
  (Core.mor_disp (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_data y))
     (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_data y)) x)

        apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
∏ x : C ^opp,
pr1 (# enriched_yoneda_data (identity y)) x =
pr1 (identity (enriched_yoneda_data y)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y: C
x: C ^opp
postcomp_arr E x (identity y) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      apply postcomp_arr_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_compax enriched_yoneda_data

EqV: Equalizers V

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V

y₁, y₂, y₃: C

g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
∏ x : C ^opp,

   · # enriched_yoneda_data g₂) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂, y₃: C
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
x: C ^opp
postcomp_arr E x (g₁ · g₂) =
postcomp_arr E x g₁ · postcomp_arr E x g₂

      apply postcomp_arr_comp.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

C
⟶ enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)

⟶ enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)

  (enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
is_functor ?F

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_data C
  (enriched_functor_category (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V))
 exact enriched_yoneda_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
is_functor enriched_yoneda_data
 exact is_functor_enriched_yoneda.
  Defined.

  Definition enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob
             (y₁ y₂ : C)
    : E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ --> PV (λ x, (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y₂ ⦄))
    := ProductArrow _ _ _ (λ x, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y₁ y₂)).

  Arguments enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob /.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_left_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_right_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_left_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_right_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
∏ i : C ^opp × C ^opp,
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_left_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂)
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄))) i =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_right_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄))) i

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_left_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂)
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄))) x =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_right_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄))) x

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
       (pr1 xy)
     · enriched_functor_left_map_ob
         (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂)
         (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄))) x =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄)))
    (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
     ProductPr (C ^opp) V
       (PV
          (λ x : C ^opp,
           self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
       (pr2 xy)
     · enriched_functor_right_map_ob
         (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)
         (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
· ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
    (PV'
       (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
        ⊸ (self_enrichment V
           ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
               (pr1 xy),
           enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
           ⦄))) x

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
            ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
        (pr1 xy)
      · enriched_functor_left_map_ob
          (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂)
          (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
           (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                  (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂
                (pr2 xy) ⦄))) x) =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
            ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
        (pr2 xy)
      · enriched_functor_right_map_ob
          (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)
          (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
           (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                  (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂
                (pr2 xy) ⦄))) x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· (ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
     (pr1 x)
   · enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
       (pr2 x)) =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
     (PV'
        (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
         (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
         ⊸ (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                (pr1 xy),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 xy)
            ⦄)))
     (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
      ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
        (pr2 xy)
      · enriched_functor_right_map_ob
          (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁)
          (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
   · ProductPr (C ^opp × C ^opp) V
       (PV'
          (λ xy : C ^opp × C ^opp,
           (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
           ⊸ (self_enrichment V
              ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                  (pr1 xy),
              enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂
                (pr2 xy) ⦄))) x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· (ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
     (pr1 x)
   · enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
       (pr2 x)) =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· (ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))

   · enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
       (pr2 x))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· ProductPr (C ^opp) V
    (PV
       (λ x : C ^opp,
        self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
    (pr1 x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x) =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· ProductPr (C ^opp) V
    (PV
       (λ x : C ^opp,
        self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ x,
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ x ⦄))
    (pr2 x)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y₂ ⦄)))
  (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y₁ y₂))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y₂ ⦄)))
    (pr1 x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x) =
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y₂ ⦄)))
  (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y₁ y₂))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y₂ ⦄)))
    (pr2 x)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x) =
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y₂ ⦄)))
  (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y₁ y₂))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, y₂ ⦄)))
    (pr2 x)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧),
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
     (pr2 x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
     (pr2 x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
     (pr2 x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
     (pr2 x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁) (pr1 x)
    (pr2 x) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x),
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr1 x) ⦄)
       (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 x, pr2 x ⦄)
     · enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂ (pr1 x)
         (pr2 x)
       #⊗ identity
            (self_enrichment V
             ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                 (pr1 x),
             enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr1 x)
             ⦄)
     · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x))
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr1 x))
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x)))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (identity
       (self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr2 x),
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x) ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁ (pr1 x)
          (pr2 x)
     · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x))
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr2 x))
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x)))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x),
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr1 x) ⦄)
        (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 x, pr2 x ⦄)
      · (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂ (pr1 x)
           (pr2 x)
         #⊗ identity
              (self_enrichment V
               ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                   (pr1 x),
               enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂
                 (pr1 x) ⦄)
         · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
             (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                (pr1 x))
             (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂
                (pr1 x))
             (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂
                (pr2 x))))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (identity
        (self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr2 x),
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x) ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁ (pr1 x)
           (pr2 x)
      · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x))
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr2 x))
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x)))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x),
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr1 x) ⦄)
     (op_enrichment V E ⦃ pr1 x, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₂ (pr1 x)
        (pr2 x)
      #⊗ identity
           (self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁
                (pr1 x),
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr1 x)
            ⦄)
      · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x))
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr1 x))
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x)))) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (identity
     (self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr2 x),
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x) ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y₁ (pr1 x)
        (pr2 x)
   · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr1 x))
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₁ (pr2 x))
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y₂ (pr2 x)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
      #⊗ identity
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
      · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
   · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
∏ (a0 : V) (h0 : V ⟦ a0, E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧),
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
 · (sym_mon_braiding V
      ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
      (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    · (internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
       · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))
#⊗ h0
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
 · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
    · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) #⊗ h0
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
 · (sym_mon_braiding V
      ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
      (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    · (internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
       · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))
#⊗ h'
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
 · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
    · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) #⊗ h'
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · ((internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)))
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · ((internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_comp (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · ((internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (internal_lam
           (mon_lassociator
              ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
              ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
              (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
            · identity
                ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
              #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
                   (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
                (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (mon_lassociator
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · identity
             ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
           #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
                (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · ((internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · identity
             ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
           #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
                (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · identity
          ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · ((internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · (identity
              ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
            #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
                (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · ((internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · (identity
              ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
            #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
                (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · ((internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
       #⊗ identity
            ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_lassociator
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
           ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · (identity
              ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
            #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
                 (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
            · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
                (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
      (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
 #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
#⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam
   (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
      (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
 #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))
#⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
  #⊗ (identity ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

C: category

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
   #⊗ (identity
         ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
       #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category

PV': Products (C × C) V
