h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
#⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
#⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
#⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
     (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)))) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)))) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))

   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂ = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
 · sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄))
#⊗ (h' · identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂ = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a
 · h #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂))
#⊗ (h' · identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂ = ?b

· (h #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂ = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· ((h #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)))) =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(h #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂))
#⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))) = 
?t2

#⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· h
  #⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂ = ?t2

· (h
   #⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
       #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
   · (identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)

#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· (identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
   #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)

    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))

#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(h · identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄))
#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
h
#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)) = ?y'

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂ = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· ((identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    #⊗ internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator
        ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity
           ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
         #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
              (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
             (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
#⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator
     ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
     ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
 #⊗ internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
#⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator
    ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    ((E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator
  ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator
  ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ (internal_lam
         (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
       #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ (internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ (internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ (internal_lam
      (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
    #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄))
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
      (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator
     ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator
     ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator
     ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
     (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))) = ?b

a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
#⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator
    ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄) =
?b

· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity ((E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)

         (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))

   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, y₂ ⦄)) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (h #⊗ h'
    · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂ = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (h #⊗ h'
       · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
            (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁))
   · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁)
   · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₁
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) y₁ y₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
           #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr2 x) (pr1 x) y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
           #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₂ ⦄)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
           #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a
        ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂ #⊗ h))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a
        ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂ #⊗ h)) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
           #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a
        ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂ #⊗ h)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
           #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a
        ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂ #⊗ h)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂ #⊗ h = ?t2

      apply tensor_split.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a
        ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
      · (identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ h
         · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
           #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)))) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
           #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V a
    ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E (pr1 x) y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V a
    ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)

sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V a
    ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V a
    ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· identity (a ⊗ (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V a
    ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (identity (a ⊗ (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h'
   · (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V a
           ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
         · identity
             ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h))) =
?b

a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (a ⊗ (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a
        ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
      · identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
        #⊗ h)) = ?t2

    ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))

· identity a #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h')

      · identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))

· (sym_mon_braiding V a
     ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
   · identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
     #⊗ h) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity a #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h')
· sym_mon_braiding V a
    ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ identity a
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
· ((identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ identity a
   · identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
     #⊗ h) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ identity a
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h'
 · identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)))
#⊗ (identity a · h) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
      · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h)) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
      · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
      · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
   · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
           (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄))) =
?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

PV': Products (C × C) V

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h #⊗ h')
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)) = ?t2

· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

PV: Products C V

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (h #⊗ h'
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)
        (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V a a' · h' #⊗ h)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) = ?t2

· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h' #⊗ h)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) = ?t2

a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧

· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h' #⊗ h)
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
       (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄)) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ (h' #⊗ h)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄)
    (E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a
      · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
      · (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
· sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h') #⊗ h

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
· sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a'))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a'))
· identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a' ⊗ a)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· (identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a'))
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a
   · mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
· sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a
