E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a' =
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
· sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
· sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
      · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a)) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
      · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
   · (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
      · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
· (sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a'
· sym_mon_braiding V a ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a')
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a' a = ?t2

      apply sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· (sym_mon_braiding V a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity a'
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
   · identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a') =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a #⊗ identity a'
· sym_mon_braiding V a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a' =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a
 · sym_mon_braiding V a (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a' =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a) #⊗ identity a'
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a' =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ a ⊗ a')
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a' =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
x: C ^opp × C ^opp
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ pr2 x, pr1 x ⦄ ⟧
a': V
h': V ⟦ a', E ⦃ pr1 x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a' =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) a a'
· identity (E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V a a'

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_enrichment_data enriched_yoneda_functor E
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
functor_enrichment_data enriched_yoneda_functor E
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
V ⟦ E ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄,
enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV'
⦃ enriched_yoneda_functor y₁,
enriched_yoneda_functor y₂ ⦄ ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
y₁, y₂: C
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_left_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_functor y₂)) =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob y₁ y₂
· enriched_functor_right_map (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
    (pr2 (enriched_yoneda_functor y₁))

    exact (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y₁ y₂).
  Defined.

  Arguments enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data /.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
is_functor_enrichment enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
is_functor_enrichment enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ x : C,
enriched_id E x · enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x x =
enriched_id
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
  (enriched_yoneda_functor x)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ x y z : C,
enriched_comp E x y z
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x z =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data y z
#⊗ enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x y
· enriched_comp
    (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
    (enriched_yoneda_functor x)
    (enriched_yoneda_functor y)
    (enriched_yoneda_functor z)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
  (# enriched_yoneda_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ x : C,
enriched_id E x · enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x x =
enriched_id
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
  (enriched_yoneda_functor x)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x: C
enriched_id E x
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))
    (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x x) =
enriched_functor_hom_id (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x: C
enriched_id E x
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))
    (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x x)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)) =
enriched_functor_hom_id (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x: C
enriched_id E x
· (EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))
     (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x x)
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))) =
enriched_functor_hom_id (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
  (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x: C
enriched_id E x
· (EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))
     (E ⦃ x, x ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x x)
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)) I_{ V}
  (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0 ⦄))
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0)))
  (mor_to_enriched_functor_hom_subproof
     (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x) I_{ V}
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0))
     (enriched_functor_hom_id_eq (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)))
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x: C
enriched_id E x
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x)) =
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x: C
∏ i : C,
enriched_id E x
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) i =
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_id E x
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) y =
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_id E x
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
       y) =
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_id (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_id E x
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
       y) =
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_id (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_id E x
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
       y) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
?b =
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_id (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_id E x
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
       y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x x))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) y =
?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_id E x · internal_lam (enriched_comp E y x x) =
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_id (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄))) y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
enriched_id E x · internal_lam (enriched_comp E y x x) =
internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_id E x
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp E y x x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) =
internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_id E x
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp E y x x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) =
internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E y x x)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) =
internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E y x x)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)) =
internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x =
internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_id (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ y, x ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ y, x ⦄) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (enriched_id E x #⊗ identity (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E y x x) =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· enriched_id E x #⊗ identity (E ⦃ y, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E y x x =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ y, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x =
enriched_id E x #⊗ h · enriched_comp E y x x

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ x y z : C,
enriched_comp E x y z
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x z =
enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data y z
#⊗ enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x y
· enriched_comp
    (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
    (enriched_yoneda_functor x)
    (enriched_yoneda_functor y)
    (enriched_yoneda_functor z)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
    (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x z) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
    (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x z)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· (EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
     (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x z)
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· (EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
     (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x z)
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)
      ⊗ enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
        (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
           (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV
           PV PV'
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)))
     (mor_to_enriched_functor_hom_subproof
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)
        (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
           (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)
         ⊗ enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
             (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
             (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
             (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
        (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
           (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV
           PV PV'
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
        (enriched_functor_hom_comp_laws
           (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV
           PV PV'
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
           (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)))
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z)) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
    (PV
       (λ x0 : C ^opp,
        self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
    (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
       (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
       PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z: C
∏ i : C,
enriched_comp E x y z
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄))) i =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
    (PV
       (λ x0 : C ^opp,
        self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
    (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
       (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
       PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄))) i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄))) w =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
    (PV
       (λ x0 : C ^opp,
        self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
    (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
       (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
       PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄))) w

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
     (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
        PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
?b =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
     (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
        PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x z))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄))) w =
?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z) =
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
     (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
        PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
     (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
        PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w) =
enriched_comp E x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
     (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
        PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
?b =
enriched_comp E x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
     (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) EqV PV
        PV' (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄)))
       w) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x0 ⦄))
  (enriched_functor_hom_comp_data (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, z ⦄))) w =
?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
  (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp_data (op_enrichment V E)
    (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z) w =
enriched_comp E x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)

C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C

  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))

     (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
     (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z)))
  (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq y z)
#⊗ EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· ((EqualizerArrow
      (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
         (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)
         (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment z))
    · ProductPr (C ^opp) V

           (λ x : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x,

   #⊗ (EqualizerArrow

   · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x w)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y w)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z w)) =
enriched_comp E x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)

   (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z))

           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄)) w)
· enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x w)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y w)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z w) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
(ProductArrow C V
   (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
   (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z))
 · ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x ⦄)) w)
#⊗ (ProductArrow C V
      (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
    · ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄)) w) =
?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
(ProductArrow C V
   (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
   (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z))
 · ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x ⦄)) w)
#⊗ (ProductArrow C V
      (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
    · ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄)) w) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
?b = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
(ProductArrow C V
   (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
   (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z))
 · ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x ⦄)) w)
#⊗ (ProductArrow C V
      (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
      (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
    · ProductPr (C ^opp) V
        (PV
           (λ x0 : C ^opp,
            self_enrichment V
            ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
            enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄)) w) =
?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr (C ^opp) V
    (PV
       (λ x0 : C ^opp,
        self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄)) w =
?t2

          exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
(ProductArrow C V
   (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
   (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z))
 · ProductPr (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x ⦄)) w)
#⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x : C, (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))
  (λ x : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x y z))
· ProductPr (C ^opp) V
    (PV
       (λ x : C ^opp,
        self_enrichment V
        ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x,
        enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z x ⦄)) w = 
?y'

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
#⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)
· enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x w)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y w)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z w) =
enriched_comp E x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
enriched_comp E x y z
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z) =
internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
#⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)
· enriched_comp (self_enrichment V)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x w)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y w)
    (enriched_repr_presheaf_functor z w)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_comp E x y z
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)
 · internal_comp (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_comp E x y z
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)
 · internal_comp (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_comp (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_comp (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x z)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
        ((E ⦃ w, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
        #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp E w x z =
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     ((E ⦃ w, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     ((E ⦃ w, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) =
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp E w x z

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     ((E ⦃ w, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
?b =
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp E w x z

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     ((E ⦃ w, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
     #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 #⊗ internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
    ((E ⦃ w, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
  #⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h)
· identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
   #⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h)
   · (identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
      #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))) = 
?b

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h)
· (identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
   #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) = ?t2

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V

#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h)
· identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄))
  #⊗ internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) = ?t2

(internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
 · identity ((E ⦃ w, y ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)))
#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄))
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) = ?t2

    · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄))
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) = ?t2

#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄))
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄) = ?t2

#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄))
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w y z)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, z ⦄)) = ?t2

#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄))
· enriched_comp E w y z = ?t2

PV': Products (C × C) V

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E w x y)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h · enriched_comp E w x y =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
       · enriched_comp E w x y)
   · enriched_comp E w y z) =
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp E w x z

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ h · enriched_comp E w x z =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
       · enriched_comp E w x y)
   · enriched_comp E w y z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
       · enriched_comp E w x y)
   · enriched_comp E w y z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w x z) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
       · enriched_comp E w x y)
   · enriched_comp E w y z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
   · enriched_comp E w y z) =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
       · enriched_comp E w x y)
   · enriched_comp E w y z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h
      · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

PV': Products (C × C) V

· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =

· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C

(identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =

· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y, z, w: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) a
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h

· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h)
   · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y) =

· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h

· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E: enrichment C V

PV': Products (C × C) V

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧

· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr
  (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
  (# enriched_yoneda_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data x y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
  (enriched_repr_nat_trans_enrichment f) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
    (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
  (enriched_repr_nat_trans_enrichment f)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· EqualizerIn
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
    (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (ProductArrow C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       (λ x0 : C,
        internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
    (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (op_enrichment V E)
  (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
  (enriched_repr_nat_trans_enrichment f)
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· (EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
EqualizerIn
  (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
     (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)) I_{ V}
  (ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
     (PV
        (λ x0 : C ^opp,
         self_enrichment V
         ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
         enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄))
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
        (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor f x0)))
  (mor_to_enriched_functor_hom_subproof
     (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V) PV PV'
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
     (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y) I_{ V}
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
        (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor f x0))
     (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr_eq
        (op_enrichment V E) (self_enrichment V)
        (enriched_repr_nat_trans_enrichment f)))
· EqualizerArrow
    (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
       (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· (EqualizerIn
     (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
        (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
        (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y))
     (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (ProductArrow C V
        (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
        (λ x0 : C,
         internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y)))
     (enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_eq x y)
   · EqualizerArrow
       (enriched_functor_hom (op_enrichment V E)
          (self_enrichment V) EqV PV PV'
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment x)
          (enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor f x0)) =
enriched_from_arr E f
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ i : C,
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor f x0))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) i =
enriched_from_arr E f
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor f x0))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z =
enriched_from_arr E f
· ProductArrow C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
    (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
ProductArrow (C ^opp) V
  (PV
     (λ x0 : C ^opp,
      self_enrichment V
      ⦃ enriched_repr_presheaf_functor x x0,
      enriched_repr_presheaf_functor y x0 ⦄))
  (λ x0 : C ^opp,
   enriched_from_arr (self_enrichment V)
     (enriched_repr_nat_trans_mor f x0))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z =
enriched_from_arr E f
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E x0 f))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z =
enriched_from_arr E f
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       z)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
enriched_from_arr E f
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       z) = internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
enriched_from_arr E f
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       z) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
?b = internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
enriched_from_arr E f
· (ProductArrow C V
     (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
     (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
   · ProductPr C V
       (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
       z) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
ProductArrow C V
  (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄)))
  (λ x0 : C, internal_lam (enriched_comp E x0 x y))
· ProductPr C V
    (PV (λ x0 : C, (E ⦃ x0, x ⦄) ⊸ (E ⦃ x0, y ⦄))) z =
?t2

        exact (ProductPrCommutes C V _ _ _ _ _).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
enriched_from_arr E f
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y) =
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_from_arr E f
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_from_arr E f
 · internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)

PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)
