a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (enriched_comp E z x y)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) =
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h · enriched_comp E z x y =
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)

C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h · enriched_comp E z x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_from_arr (postcomp_arr E z f)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h · enriched_comp E z x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) · postcomp_arr E z f)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) (E ⦃ z, y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h · enriched_comp E z x y

E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) · postcomp_arr E z f) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h · enriched_comp E z x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E z x y)) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h · enriched_comp E z x y

identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E z x y =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h · enriched_comp E z x y

   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))) =

EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C

h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧

· (mon_lunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)) =
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ z, x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ z, x ⦄))
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) = 
?t2

        apply id_left.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ z, x ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C V
PV': Products (C × C) V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: C
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E ⦃ z, x ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ h

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition enriched_yoneda_enrichment
    : functor_enrichment
        enriched_yoneda_functor
        E
        (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
    := enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data
       ,,
       is_functor_enrichment_enriched_yoneda.

  Definition enriched_yoneda
    : enriched_functor_category
        E
        (enriched_presheaf_enrichment E EqV PV PV')
    := enriched_yoneda_functor
       ,,
       enriched_yoneda_enrichment.
End YonedaEmbedding.

Arguments enriched_repr_presheaf_enrichment_data /.
Arguments enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data_ob /.
Arguments enriched_yoneda_enrichment_data /.
